productDisplayName: Doodle Men Athletic 77 Dept Yellow tee Yellow Kidswear
description: CompositionRed round neck, sleeveless t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with white piping around the neckline and sleeves, chest print and print below the neck with flock detailing, embroidery and rubber printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Imbibe the spirit of Sports in your little man with this t-shirt from doodle. Let him learn the spirit of sports by playing various games with his friends, while doodle takes care of keeping him cool and comfortable. Team this with capris and sneakers for an even more sporty look.
